description: Style NoteIf you want a bag that's funky, stylish, cool and comfortable to carry around all day, check out this piece from adidas. Carry it while traveling or to hold your workout kit.Product DetailsBlue duffel bag, one front zipped mesh pocket, one main zipped compartment with box style opening, one side zipped pocket, one side elasticated pocket, one adjustable strap with shoulder padding, two short handles for carrying at ease, fabric zip pulls, Clima cool technology, branding on the frontMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 23 cmWidth: 54 cmDepth: 34 cm
